## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.59

### Camera WebRTC
- Sends X-Sense cameras a narrower native WebRTC SDP offer with PCMU audio and H264 video payloads.
- Keeps the data channel and trickled ICE candidate path intact.
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC audio/video path active without AlexxIT/WebRTC, go2rtc, aiortc, or transcoding.

### Debug Logging
- Adds compact diagnostics comparing the browser offer shape with the relayed camera offer shape.
- Adds compact counts for audio and video payloads kept or removed from the relayed offer.
- Keeps SDP, ICE candidates, ticket signatures, tokens, and full serial numbers out of debug logs.
